SEARCH
Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.variable

Class DefaultRestrictedVariableInterceptor

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.variable.DefaultRestrictedVariableInterceptor
All Implemented Interfaces:
VariableInterceptor
public class DefaultRestrictedVariableInterceptor extends Object implements VariableInterceptor
Default implementation of VariableInterceptor that performs authorization checks and filters restricted variables when unauthorized.

  • Method Details

    • interceptGetVariable

      public TypedValue interceptGetVariable(VariableInstance variableInstance, TypedValue value)
      Description copied from interface: VariableInterceptor
      Intercepts a variable read operation.
      Specified by:
      interceptGetVariable in interface VariableInterceptor
      Parameters:
      variableInstance - the variable instance being read
      value - the raw typed value
      Returns:
      the intercepted typed value (may be null if filtered)

    • interceptGetHistoricVariable

      public TypedValue interceptGetHistoricVariable(HistoricVariableInstance historicVariableInstance, TypedValue value)
      Description copied from interface: VariableInterceptor
      Intercepts a historic variable read operation.
      Specified by:
      interceptGetHistoricVariable in interface VariableInterceptor
      Parameters:
      historicVariableInstance - the historic variable instance being read
      value - the raw typed value
      Returns:
      the intercepted typed value (may be null if filtered)

    • interceptCreateVariable

      public CoreVariableInstance interceptCreateVariable(CoreVariableInstance variableInstance)
      Description copied from interface: VariableInterceptor
      Intercepts a variable create operation.
      Specified by:
      interceptCreateVariable in interface VariableInterceptor
      Parameters:
      variableInstance - the variable instance being created
      Returns:
      the variable instance to persist (may be the same instance, but must not be null)

    • interceptUpdateVariable

      public TypedValue interceptUpdateVariable(CoreVariableInstance variableInstance, TypedValue newValue)
      Description copied from interface: VariableInterceptor
      Intercepts a variable update operation.
      Specified by:
      interceptUpdateVariable in interface VariableInterceptor
      Parameters:
      variableInstance - the variable instance being updated
      newValue - the new typed value being set
      Returns:
      the value to persist (may be the same value, but must not be null)
